'''''Excelsior''''' was an [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==Excelsior v.s. Blue Fox==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] reconnaissance patrols located the ''Excelsior'', and the Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Blue Fox]]'' launched an attack against her with [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa starfighters]] armed with [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] and [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]]. They also sent [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|''Alpha''-class Xg-1 Star Wings]] and three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] to try to destroy the ''Excelsior''. However, Alliance [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]] managed to hold off the attack long enough for the ''Excelsior'' to reach [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. It would send [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] to attack the ''Blue Fox''.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:XW_MC80a.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A mislabeled MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]]
Although the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]] featured in [[Star Wars: X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM|''Star Wars: X-Wing: Collector's CD-ROM'']] are identified in-game as [[MC80a Star Cruiser]]s, they are visually modeled on the [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']] type [[Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruiser]]<ref name="XWC">[[Star Wars: X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM|''Star Wars: X-Wing'' Collector's CD-ROM]]</ref> seen in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>
